features.name: randomize with constraint using $clog2 on division expression
features.description: Code should include a class with rand members and a static function that calls randomize() with a constraint block where $clog2() is applied to a localparam division expression and result is type-cast

features.name: $clog2 with localparam arithmetic in constraint
features.description: Code should include a randomization constraint where $clog2 is applied to a localparam divided by a literal constant

features.name: type cast in randomization constraint
features.description: Code should include a randomization constraint expression using type cast syntax with single quotes to cast a $clog2 result
